title: A Woman in Grey
writer: Walter R. Hall, A.M. Williamson, C.N. Williamson
actors: Arline Pretty, Henry G. Sell, Fred C. Jones
plot: After the murder of Mrs. Haynes, resident of the old Armory homestead, there is an ever increasing intensity of the struggle for possession of the Amory code, in which lies the secret of the Amory fortune.
